forecast.name: Today
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 30. West wind 7 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Snow
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow after 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 11. Southwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

weather_report:
As dawn breaks over Boston, the sky presents a tranquil canvas of blue, punctuated by soft whispers of clouds. The air is crisp, an invigorating chill that invites you to greet the day with purpose. With temperatures hovering around the low thirties, the atmosphere feels both refreshing and invigorating, a gentle reminder of the winter season still firmly in its grasp. The day ahead promises a delightful contrast; under the mostly sunny skies, the warmth of the sun will elevate our spirits and provide a welcome embrace as it reaches a peak of nearly thirty degrees. Winds, though gentle, may brush against your skin, serving as a playful accompaniment to the smooth flow of your morning routine.

As the day's light begins to soften and night approaches, a slight chance of snow whispers through the evening air, hinting at a transformation that might blanket the city with a delicate layer. With a low dipping to around eleven, you might consider wrapping yourself in layers snug enough to cradle warmth without sacrificing movement. A wool scarf, a soft hat, and perhaps a pair of sturdy gloves will not only keep the chilly breeze at bay but may also enhance your comfort as you wander through the streets or sip a warmly brewed cup of coffee at a local café. Given these serene conditions, it’s an opportune time to meander through the narrow streets, perhaps visiting a lesser-known gallery or indulging in some quiet reflection at a nearby park—both activities well-suited for this vibrant yet tranquil day.
